import mteb
import pandas as pd

# Get the Scandinavian benchmark
try:
    scandinavian_benchmark = mteb.get_benchmark("MTEB(Scandinavian, v1)")
    print(f"Scandinavian benchmark: {scandinavian_benchmark.name}")
    print(f"Description: {scandinavian_benchmark.description}")
    print(f"Number of tasks: {len(scandinavian_benchmark.tasks)}")
    
    # Load results for this benchmark
    all_results = mteb.load_results(only_main_score=True, require_model_meta=False)
    
    # Filter for Scandinavian benchmark results
    scandinavian_results = all_results.filter_benchmarks(["MTEB(Scandinavian, v1)"])
    
    print(f"\nNumber of models in Scandinavian benchmark: {len(scandinavian_results.model_names)}")
    
    # Get the mean scores for each model
    model_scores = {}
    for model_name in scandinavian_results.model_names:
        model_result = scandinavian_results.get_model_result(model_name)
        if model_result and model_result.scores:
            # Calculate mean score across all tasks
            scores = [task_result.main_score for task_result in model_result.scores.values() 
                     if task_result and task_result.main_score is not None]
            if scores:
                mean_score = sum(scores) / len(scores)
                model_scores[model_name] = mean_score
    
    # Sort models by mean score
    sorted_models = sorted(model_scores.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    
    print(f"\nTop 10 models for Scandinavian benchmark:")
    for i, (model_name, score) in enumerate(sorted_models[:10], 1):
        print(f"{i}. {model_name}: {score:.4f}")
        
    # Get the best model
    if sorted_models:
        best_model, best_score = sorted_models[0]
        print(f"\nBest model: {best_model} with score: {best_score:.4f}")
    else:
        print("\nNo models found for Scandinavian benchmark")
        
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error: {e}")
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc()
